calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-25-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Robert Dondero, Clerk Nicole Adams, Reporter JoAnn Bryce.

Case called for trial. Case has settled pursuant to a stipulation for entry of judgment. The previously entered default as to defent Greg Rice is incorporated within this settlement. Plaintiff will have judgment for possession of the premises at 1441 Larkin St., Apt. 1, San Francisco, CA. Judgment will not be entered if defendant vacates on or before Aug-27 2003. Defendant will pay to plaintiff $6,000 in quarterly installments, with payments of $1,500 commencing on Oct-15-2003. If the terms of this settlement are complied with, plaintiff will dismiss this action with prejudice. If the terms of this settlement are defaulted, plaintiff may move by ex parte application and declaration, after giving 24 hours notice to defendant, for immediate possession and $6,000 less any payments. There will be a mutual release of all claims, the lease is forfeited and plaintiff will retain the security deposit.
